title: Guard Ribbits
description: Add guard ribbits to the Ribbit villages
body:
Adds Guard Ribbits that'll protect any Ribbits at all costs!


This seems like a easy mod I have made ever


Credit goes to obatkuat for the model/texture.



Backport it?

NO! It will always go through latest versions.



Things I didn't fix yet:
-Guard Ribbit spawning in Ribbit villages

-Ribbits alerting Ribbit Guards
